text.title: Weekly LLM Cost Review Template Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Weekly LLM Cost Review Template application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Report segments spend by surface AND model AND provider; never one-axis only.

rationale.source: Weekly LLM Cost Review Template authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Single-axis spend hides the actual driver; three-axis segmentation surfaces it.

rule.statement: Each cell shows actual vs forecast delta; deviation >15% triggers a 'why' row.

rationale.source: Weekly LLM Cost Review Template authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Reports without delta show numbers but not signal; 15% is the typical noise floor.

rule.statement: Each action item has owner + due-date + success metric; no orphan TODOs.

rationale.source: Weekly LLM Cost Review Template authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Action items without owner = no action; the trio (owner / due / metric) makes the action falsifiable.

rule.statement: Top-3 drivers carry a WoW trend (↑ / → / ↓) with magnitude.

rationale.source: Weekly LLM Cost Review Template authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Without trend, the report is a snapshot; trend tells the team whether to escalate or wait.

rule.statement: Each weekly report is archived under a versioned path; prior reports remain readable.

rationale.source: Weekly LLM Cost Review Template authoring evidence + websearch 2026-05

rule.rationale: Overwriting the report loses the trend; archive enables longitudinal review.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.
